task_completion.description: Log into Floreant POS using the administrator PIN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS login screen showing the PIN '1111' being entered, or the main Back Office/Admin dashboard visible after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration or settings menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Configuration', 'Settings', or 'Back Office' window is opened within the Floreant POS application.

task_completion.description: Locate the specific settings tab or section containing the gratuity configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration tab is selected where both 'Default Gratuity' and 'Service Charge' fields are visible.
The text input field explicitly labeled 'Default Gratuity' (or similar) contains the value '18' or '18.0'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Service Charge' setting was not mistakenly modified to 18%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field labeled 'Service Charge' is visible and does NOT contain '18' or '18.0' (it should be left at its original value).
The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Apply', or 'OK' button in the configuration window, or a success dialog confirming the settings were saved is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Floreant POS GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS graphical interface, not terminal commands, database scripts, or SQL clients.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard Floreant POS Java application, not a text editor, mock-up, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the result using image editing or text manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fonts, window styles, and UI elements are consistent with a genuine Java Swing application (Floreant POS) without signs of tampering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected default gratuity rate is exactly 18.0 (tolerance of 0.1). The task explicitly requires modifying the 'Default Gratuity' field and NOT the 'Service Charge' field. Verify visually that the correct field was updated in the GUI.
